div.p: System Invariant: Load % = (Current Queue Depth / Processing Rate) * 100 Hysteresis: Recovery requires a -10% load delta from transition threshold.

g.title: Congestion starting to build: Queue filling
Server near saturation: Dropping non-essential packets
System saturation exceeded: Emergency filtering active

div.p: Reference: Intel NIC Flow Director Specification Rev 2.1 Module: kbns/sched/shedder.c

g.title: Congestion starting to build: Queue filling
Server near saturation: Dropping non-essential packets
System saturation exceeded: Emergency filtering active
